Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

LagId.markdownDescription:
The ID of the LAG.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^dxlag-[a-z0-9]{8,21}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ProviderName.description: The name of the service provider associated with the requested LAG.
ProviderName.markdownDescription:
The name of the service provider associated with the requested LAG.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

RequestMACSec.description: Indicates whether you want the LAG to support MAC Security (MACsec).
RequestMACSec.markdownDescription:
Indicates whether you want the LAG to support MAC Security (MACsec).

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: Replacement

ConnectionsBandwidth.description: The bandwidth of the individual physical dedicated connections bundled by the LAG.
ConnectionsBandwidth.markdownDescription:
The bandwidth of the individual physical dedicated connections bundled by the LAG.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[1-9][0-9]*(M|G)bps$  
Update requires: Replacement

LagArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the LAG.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z-]*:directconnect:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:dxlag/dxlag-[a-z0-9]{8,21}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

LagName.markdownDescription:
The name of the LAG.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[\w \-_,\/]{1,200}$  
Update requires: No interruption

MinimumLinks.description: The minimum number of physical dedicated connections that must be operational for the LAG itself to be operational.
MinimumLinks.markdownDescription:
The minimum number of physical dedicated connections that must be operational for the LAG itself to be operational.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.description: The tags associated with the LAG.
Tags.markdownDescription:
The tags associated with the LAG.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

LagState.markdownDescription:
The state of the LAG.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^(requested|pending|available|down|deleting|deleted|unknown)$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

The location for the LAG.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$  
Update requires: Replacement
